data.title: Contract stub: preconditions-schema-v2 depth-tier field-set and schema_version evolution policy
data.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Context
Story 86ad-f5e7 (Layer 1 of epic 736d-b957). This task creates the contract stub document that pins the schema_version field rules and the field-set discriminator contract between the depth-tier classifier and the preconditions writer/reader. The full contract will be completed by Story 7 (ad8f-3a8a).

**Spike note:** The depth-tier classifier (T2) is explicitly a spike with heuristic weights — the contract stub should document this and note the FP auto-fallback guardrail (Story 6).

## Implementation

Create: `plugins/dso/docs/contracts/preconditions-schema-v2.md`

Required sections:
- **Signal Name**: `PRECONDITIONS_EVENT`
- **Emitter**: `preconditions-depth-classifier.sh` (via `_write_preconditions()` in ticket-lib.sh)
- **Parser**: `_read_latest_preconditions()` in ticket-lib.sh; stage-boundary validators (Stories 2 & 4)
- **schema_version evolution policy**: minimal=1 (Story 1), standard/deep=2 (this story). Bump only on breaking field changes. Never repurpose a version number.
- **manifest_depth field-set discriminator**: minimal → {gate_verdicts, workflow_completion_checklist, completeness}; standard → adds {extended_gate_verdicts[], derived_invariants[]}; deep → adds {full_trace[], dependency_chain[]}
- **Forward-compat contract**: readers MUST accept unknown schema_version by falling back to minimal-tier interpretation, logging once per (ticket, version), never rejecting
- **Spike disclaimer**: classifier mapping is heuristic with generous FP budget; Story 6 auto-fallback hedges misclassification

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] File exists at `plugins/dso/docs/contracts/preconditions-schema-v2.md`
  Verify: test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/contracts/preconditions-schema-v2.md
- [ ] File contains required Signal Name section
  Verify: grep -q "Signal Name" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/contracts/preconditions-schema-v2.md
- [ ] File contains schema_version evolution policy section
  Verify: grep -q "schema_version" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/contracts/preconditions-schema-v2.md
- [ ] File contains manifest_depth field-set discriminator table
  Verify: grep -q "manifest_depth" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/contracts/preconditions-schema-v2.md
- [ ] File contains forward-compat contract section
  Verify: grep -q "forward.compat\|forward_compat" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/contracts/preconditions-schema-v2.md
- [ ] check-contract-schemas.sh passes
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit/check-contract-schemas.sh

## Retry Budget
MAX_ATTEMPTS: 3 (sonnet model)
On 3 consecutive sonnet failures: escalate to opus with full diagnostic context (all 3 failure messages)
On 3 consecutive opus failures (6 total): escalate to user with full failure history
If MAX_AGENTS: 0 at sonnet→opus escalation time: skip opus step, escalate to user immediately
